default_creds.context: default root credential when common.security.authorizationEnabled=true; registry-confirmed (vendor-port-registry default_auth: OFF (root/Milvus))

active_probe.false_positive_check: response data.nodeInfos field is Milvus-specific — present in healthy cluster health response

deployment_tells: Port 19530 is Milvus-specific — lower FP than port 8000 cluster
Attu web UI often running at port 8000 alongside gRPC on 19530
Error messages reveal Milvus version for CVE matching
pivot_paths: GET /v1/vector/collections → list collections → query vectors without auth
Error response bodies reveal exact Milvus version string
Attu UI at :8000 → full vector database browser without credentials
vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-26190 (CVSS 9.8): port 9091 zero-auth REST API; /expr evals arbitrary expressions with default by-dev etcd token; GET :9091/api/v1/credential/users enumerates users even when 19530 auth ON; fixed 2.5.27/2.6.10; GHSA-7ppg-37fh-vcr6
CVE-2025-64513 (CVSS 9.3): forge sourceId header @@milvus-member@@ (base64: QEBtaWx2dXMtbWVtYmVyQEA=) to gain admin
